boundary: Static local assumptions only; no live data, broker API, orders, predictions, portfolio optimization, tax/legal/investment advice, or buy/sell/hold recommendations.

field_deltas.review_impact: Changes the cash drag spread against the gross return assumption.
Changes the realized-gain portion of turnover/tax drag arithmetic.
Changes cost per rebalance event used in rebalance drag.
Changes the annual rebalance event count used in rebalance drag.
Changes the taxable share used in turnover/tax drag arithmetic.
Changes the compounding horizon and duration over which drag accumulates.

review_note: Field deltas are review prompts only; this output contains no tax, legal, investment, or buy/sell/hold advice.
